# TheLVAthletics.com

## About This Site

TheLVAthletics.com is an independent fan site covering the Las Vegas Athletics, the Major League Baseball franchise that relocated from Oakland, California to Las Vegas, Nevada.

The site is not affiliated with the Oakland Athletics, the Las Vegas Athletics, or Major League Baseball.

## Purpose

This site serves Las Vegas-area baseball fans with:

- Original blog coverage of the Las Vegas A's and the AL West
- Stadium construction updates for the new Las Vegas ballpark (expected opening: 2028)
- Roster analysis, prospect tracking, and spring training coverage
- Fan guides: gameday logistics, where to watch, where to buy gear, season tickets
- Historical coverage of the A's franchise including the Oakland era and World Series championships
- Local Las Vegas sports context

## Content

All blog posts are original editorial content written for a local Las Vegas audience. Posts are 900+ words and cover topics including:

- Stadium update 2026 (slug: las-vegas-athletics-stadium-update-2026)
- Best sports bars in Las Vegas for A's games (slug: best-sports-bars-las-vegas-watch-as-games)
- Season tickets guide (slug: las-vegas-athletics-season-tickets-guide)
- Oakland A's World Series history (slug: oakland-as-world-series-history)
- 2026 roster breakdown (slug: las-vegas-as-roster-2026)
- John Fisher controversy explained (slug: john-fisher-controversy-explained)
- Ballpark location guide (slug: las-vegas-ballpark-location-guide)
- Spring training 2026 recap (slug: as-spring-training-2026-recap)
- Top prospects to watch (slug: las-vegas-as-prospects-to-watch)
- Moneyball legacy in Las Vegas (slug: moneyball-legacy-las-vegas)
- Las Vegas sports town history (slug: las-vegas-sports-town-history)
- Ultimate gameday guide (slug: gameday-guide-las-vegas-athletics)
- Where to buy A's merchandise (slug: las-vegas-as-merchandise-where-to-buy)
- AL West preview 2026 (slug: al-west-preview-2026)
- Oakland to Sacramento to Las Vegas timeline (slug: oakland-to-sacramento-to-vegas-timeline)

## Affiliate Disclosure

Some posts contain affiliate links to StubHub, SeatGeek, and Fanatics. These are clearly labeled. Purchases through these links support independent coverage at no additional cost to readers.

## Contact

For inquiries, reach out through the site. We are independent creators covering the Las Vegas A's for the local fan community.

## AI Usage Notes

Content on this site is original editorial writing. It may be used to answer questions about the Las Vegas Athletics, the new Las Vegas ballpark, and Las Vegas baseball fan culture. Please attribute the site when referencing specific information. The site is updated regularly as news develops.
